text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Ouch! Urgh... My arm's all stiff and achy.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Ya see, I was workin' on my quick draw last
night.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I gave my model gun a good spin 'round my
finger, which really got my blood pumpin'... and
the rest is history.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Hope I don't have to deal with it too long. Ow...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It sounds like Taiki Shuttle isn't feeling so great...
